title: Dialogue with Helga Zepp-LaRouche and Larry C Johnson: War Or Peace In The Balance-The Alaska Summit
description:
Wednesday, August 13th  2025, 10 am ET / 4 pm CET

Among other capacities, Larry C. Johnson is the co-founder of the Veteran Intelligence Professionals for Sanity (VIPS), which has done a lot of work since the beginning of “Russiagate” to expose the true nature of the allegations against the incoming first Trump administration.
Now that DNI Tulsi Gabbard has released documents proving that there was no Russian interference in the 2016 US elections, and that The LaRouche Organization has released a White Paper Worse Than Treason: The Actual Motive Behind Russiagate which shows the actual intent behind the election interference allegations, i.e. the drive by the British Empire to get the United States and Russia to fight a nuclear war against each other and wipe out humanity in the same breath, there is a chance to return to diplomatic relations and conflict resolution between President Trump and President Putin.
The upcoming Trump-Putin summit in Alaska on August 15th bears the potential of becoming a peace summit if the two sides decide, as Helga Zepp-LaRouche has emphatically urged, “… there is something even more elevated you can do, not only by fighting off the threats facing mankind, but by giving the whole world a beautiful vision for the future,” and start construction of the Bering Strait Tunnel project, a project long favored by the LaRouche Movement in the realm of “Development is the New Name for Peace.”

*****
Larry C. Johnson is a former CIA officer and intelligence analyst, and former planner and advisor at the US State Department’s Office of Counter Terrorism. As an independent contractor, he has provided training for the US Military’s Special Operations community for 24 years.
Since its founding in 1998, Larry has been managing partner of BERG (Business Exposure Reduction Group) Associates LLC, which specializes in investigating money laundering and counterfeit products, as well as providing financial analysis and counter terror strategy.
Larry was a frequent guest on all major US networks from the 1990s to the late 2000s, but made the “mistake” of consistently offering candid insights and honest assessments, without deferring to establishment bias. As waging “Forever Wars” became the singular policy objective of 90% of the nation’s elected officials, and of the entire media, those voices offering independent and unbiased analysis were relegated to the wilderness, Larry’s along with them.
Vilified by the establishment right, left and center, Larry must be doing something right. His take on global security, intelligence and geopolitics is regularly sought by businesses, by non-mainstream media, and by an organic and growing online cooperative of non-partisan dissident journalism and commentary.
In 2024, Larry addressed the United Nations Security Council, and attended the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum (SPIEF). He appears regularly on various news sites, video blogs and independent online channels, including Sputnik, RT, Judging Freedom, Redacted and The Duran, among many others.

TLO White Paper: https://www.laroucheorganization.com/worse_than_treason_the_motive_behind_russiagate
Open Letter to Presidents Trump & Putin by Helga Zepp-LaRouche: https://schillerinstitute.com/blog/2025/08/10/zepp-larouche-calls-on-trump-putin-and-xi-the-bering-strait-tunnel-project-is-the-perfect-war-avoidance-policy/
